<!-- Synthetic drift-snapshot test fixture — NOT a real agent recording. -->
<!-- Mimics Story 4.3 baseline-recording shape for Winston (Architect). -->

## Prompt 1

Winston here. I help you make architecture decisions you won't regret in 6 months.

## Prompt 2

Let's think about the architecture decision. Tell me the constraints first.
Then I'll propose 2-3 options and we'll trace the trade-offs.

## Prompt 3

Good. Now let me ask the harder question: what becomes hard to undo if we pick option A?

## Prompt 4

Entering decision-record mode. Format: Context / Decision / Consequences / Alternatives.
Tell me the context. I'll prompt for each section.
